name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของรายการอาวุธ
description: Partial import. The listed basic tiered weapons are present, but the source page contains additional entries that have not yet been imported.
unimported_scope: Uncraftable and artifact entries in every weapon category
notes: A null field means the source page used for this import did not verify that value. Do not treat the current record count as the complete weapon catalogue.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของรายการเกราะ
description: Partial import. The listed tiered shields, clothes, light armor, heavy armor, and hats are present, but the source page contains additional entries that have not yet been imported.
unimported_scope: Uncraftable and artifact entries in every armor category
notes: A null field means the source page used for this import did not verify that value. Do not treat the current record count as the complete armor catalogue.

name_th: สถานะความครบถ้วนของรายการเครื่องประดับ
description: Not imported. The Armor source page lists accessory entries, but they belong in the separate accessories dataset and have not yet been added.
notes: This dataset remains empty until individual accessories are imported from a source-backed list.
